topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: IEA says over 400 million barrels of emergency oil to start flowing soon amid tensions
topStories.description: The IEA is releasing 400 million barrels of emergency oil to global markets as the US-Israel conflict with Iran disrupts supplies. dailyNews.title: Wild US Weather Halts Flights, Dumps Snow and Knocks Out Power
dailyNews.description: Blizzards, wildfires and thunderstorms are swirling toward the eastern US having knocked out power to thousands and grounded hundreds of flights across the Midwest.

dailyNews.title: Woman accused of fatal hit-and-run that killed 8 year old laughs during first court appearance
dailyNews.description: A Florida woman accused in a fatal hit-and-run was seen laughing during a court hearing as the judge read charges for an 8-year-old boy's death in the Winter Haven crash incident.

dailyNews.title: Penn's TJ Power takes advantage of massive Yale blunder to punch ticket to March Madness
dailyNews.description: Penn stunned Yale, 88-84, in overtime to claim the Ivy League title after the Bulldogs' costly blunder that allowed the Quakers a chance to tie the game late.

dailyNews.title: 2026 Oscars: Winners and losers
dailyNews.description: A comprehensive roundup of the 98th Academy Awards, including the full list of nominees and winners.

dailyNews.title: Tennessee batter celebrates go-ahead homer prematurely as Georgia outfielder makes incredible catch
dailyNews.description: The Georgia Bulldogs escaped with a win over the Tennessee Volunteers on Sunday as Cole Johnson robbed Stone Lawless' go-ahead home run.

dailyNews.title: Iranian foreign minister claims Trump launched war 'because it is fun'
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Aragchi accused President Donald Trump of launching attacks against his country "for fun" during a "Face the Nation" interview.

dailyNews.title: 2026 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament selections revealed
dailyNews.description: The NCAA selection committee released the 68 teams that will fight for a Division I men's basketball championship on Sunday with the Duke Blue Devils named the No. 1 overall seed.

dailyNews.title: Veteran '60 Minutes' reporter says the network 'crumbled' under Trump's pressure
dailyNews.description: Veteran "60 Minutes" correspondent Scott Pelley slammed CBS for settling President Donald Trump's election interference lawsuit, saying previous owners "faced political pressure and crumbled."

dailyNews.title: Team USA Paralympic sled hockey completes clean sweep of Canada at Winter Games
dailyNews.description: Team USA made Paralympic history with its fifth consecutive sled hockey gold medal, defeating Canada, 6-2, in a dominant performance in Italy.

dailyNews.title: Oscars 2026 brings star-studded red-carpet fashion led by Gwyneth Paltrow, Kate Hudson and Nicole Kidman
dailyNews.description: Oscars red carpet 2026 delivered glamorous fashion as Gwyneth Paltrow wore a white silk custom gown, Kate Hudson stunned in a seafoam green dress, and Nicole Kidman chose a strapless nude look.

dailyNews.title: Ex-NBA star says Kobe Bryant gave him mysterious message about afterlife in 'vivid' dream
dailyNews.description: Lamar Odom revealed a vivid dream where the late Los Angeles Lakers legend Kobe Bryant delivered a surprising message about the afterlife during their competition together.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants other countries to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz. That won't be easy.
dailyNews.description: U.S. allies and rivals responded cautiously after President Donald Trump said they should police the Strait of Hormuz, as Iranian threats to strike shipping on the vital trade route continue to cause chaos in global markets.“Many countries, especially those who are affected by Iran’s attempted closure of the Hormuz Strait, will be sending War Ships” to secure the shipping route, he posted Saturday on Truth Social, listing China, France, Japan, South Korea, the U.K. and “others” among t

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil prices top $100 as Trump administration threatens strikes on Iran's crude export facilities
dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
dailyNews.description: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

dailyNews.title: Democrats blast FCC Chair Carr's broadcast license threats as anti-First Amendment, 'totalitarian'
dailyNews.description: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump fundraising pitch features U.S. soldiers killed in Iran war
dailyNews.description: The email solicitation to benefit Trump’s PAC also offers donors “private national security briefings.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
